description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a test-backend job using the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:5.0 image that runs "cd backend", "dotnet restore", "dotnet test Tests/Games.UnitTests/Games.UnitTests.csproj", and "dotnet test Tests/Records.UnitTests/Records.UnitTests.csproj". Also add a test-frontend job using the node:lts-alpine image that runs "cd frontend", "npm install --silent", and "npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false". In the build stage add a build-backend job (depends on test-backend) using the same .NET SDK image that runs "cd backend", "dotnet restore", and "dotnet publish EternalGroveApi/EternalGroveApi.csproj -c Release -o out", and stores the "backend/out" directory as an artifact expiring in 30 minutes. Also add a build-frontend job (depends on test-frontend) using node:lts-alpine that runs "cd frontend", "npm install --silent", and "npx react-scripts build", and stores "frontend/build" as an artifact expiring in 30 minutes. In the deploy stage add a deploy-frontend job using python:latest that runs only on release branches, runs "pip install awscli", "aws s3 rm s3://www.eternalgrove.net/ --recursive", and "aws s3 cp frontend/build s3://www.eternalgrove.net/ --grants read=uri=http://acs.amazonaws.com/groups/global/AllUsers --recursive", and depends on build-frontend.
